allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/import { Icon, Img, IconBtn, Stepper,/import { Icon, Img, IconBtn, Stepper, DayStepper,/' src/LocationFile.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/<Stepper value={edit\\.prepDays} onChange={v => onPatch\({ prepDays: v }\)}/<DayStepper value={edit.prepDays} onChange={v => onPatch\({ prepDays: v }\)}/' src/LocationFile.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/<Stepper value={edit\\.wrapDays} onChange={v => onPatch\({ wrapDays: v }\)}/<DayStepper value={edit.wrapDays} onChange={v => onPatch\({ wrapDays: v }\)}/' src/LocationFile.tsx)
